description.overview: The Barbet is an ancient French water dog with a distinctive curly coat. They're cheerful, social dogs who love water and make excellent family companions.
description.temperament: Known for being friendly, joyful, obedient.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, woolly, curly coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: The Barbet is an ancient French water dog with a distinctive curly coat. They're cheerful, social dogs who love water and make excellent family companions.
